title: Gates Config
description: Schema for per-experiment gates.yaml files. All fields are optional. Top-level keys group thresholds by gate (convergence, fixed_interface_baseline, preflight). When present, fields override the unified-CLI defaults but are themselves overridden by explicit CLI flags. Unknown keys at every level raise to catch typos.

max_final_train_loss.description: Maximum acceptable final training loss per arm/seed. Maps to RunnerConfig.preflight_max_final_train_loss.

max_format_failure_rate.description: Maximum acceptable fixed-interface formatting failure rate per dataset. Maps to RunnerConfig.fixed_interface_max_format_failure_rate.

seed_count.description: Number of leading seeds to use for the preflight pilot. Maps to RunnerConfig.preflight_seed_count.

limit.description: Per-arm/seed item limit for the confirmatory preflight pilot evaluation. Maps to RunnerConfig.preflight_limit.

max_exclusion_rate.description: Maximum acceptable overall exclusion rate for the preflight pilot export. Maps to RunnerConfig.preflight_max_exclusion_rate.

max_arm_seed_exclusion_rate.description: Maximum acceptable exclusion rate for any single pilot arm/seed run. Maps to RunnerConfig.preflight_max_arm_seed_exclusion_rate.

min_parseability_rate.description: Minimum acceptable overall parseability rate for the preflight pilot export. Maps to RunnerConfig.preflight_min_parseability_rate.
